meta.title: Resources & Learning Center | Prosperity Planning & Advisory
meta.description: Financial planning articles, guides, videos, and tools from Prosperity Planning & Advisory. Build your financial knowledge with fiduciary-quality resources.
meta.ogTitle: Resources & Learning Center | Prosperity Planning & Advisory
meta.ogDescription: Articles, guides, videos, and tools to help you make confident financial decisions.

hero.headline: Build Your Financial Knowledge
hero.subheadline: We believe informed clients make better decisions. Explore our library of articles, guides, and tools designed to help you navigate your financial life with confidence.

categories.title: Articles & Insights
categories.description: Timely perspectives on financial planning, market trends, and strategies that matter to you.

items.title: 5 Questions to Ask Before You Retire
items.summary: Retirement readiness goes beyond your account balance. Here are the critical questions to answer before you make the transition.

items.title: Understanding Roth Conversions: Is It Right for You?
items.summary: Roth conversions can be a powerful tax strategy — but timing and execution matter. Here's what you need to know.

items.title: What Does 'Fiduciary' Actually Mean?
items.summary: The word gets used a lot in financial services. Here's what it really means and why it matters when choosing an adviser.

categories.title: Planning Guides
categories.description: In-depth guides that walk you through key financial planning topics step by step.

items.title: The Business Owner's Guide to Retirement Plan Options
items.summary: SEP IRA, SIMPLE IRA, Solo 401(k), Defined Benefit — which plan is right for your business? A comprehensive comparison.

items.title: Your First Year of Retirement: A Financial Checklist
items.summary: The decisions you make in your first year of retirement set the tone for decades. Use this checklist to stay on track.

items.title: Estate Planning Essentials: What Every Family Should Have in Place
items.summary: Wills, trusts, beneficiary designations, and powers of attorney — the foundational documents every family needs.

categories.title: Videos & Webinars
categories.description: Watch and learn — short videos and recorded webinars on the topics that matter most to your financial future.

items.title: How Our Six-Step Process Works
items.summary: A quick overview of how we guide clients from their first Clarity Session through ongoing support.

items.title: Prosperity Pathways™ Portfolios Explained
items.summary: Learn about our six portfolio pathways and how we match your investments to your goals and risk tolerance.

categories.title: Financial Tools & Calculators
categories.description: Interactive tools to help you explore your financial questions and run quick scenarios.

items.title: Retirement Readiness Calculator
items.summary: Get a quick snapshot of where you stand relative to your retirement income goals.

items.title: College Savings Estimator
items.summary: Estimate how much you may need to save for your child's education and explore 529 plan strategies.

items.title: Spending Strategy Worksheet
items.summary: Build your zero-based budget and organize your finances using our bank-bucket system framework.

ctaBand.heading: Want Personalized Guidance?
ctaBand.body: Resources are a great starting point — but nothing replaces a plan built around your specific goals. Let's talk.
